name: Spiced Applesauce Bread
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350°F.
2 Lightly coat one loaf pan with vegetable cooking spray.
3 Sift together flours, salt, baking soda, and spices in a bowl.
4 In a separate bowl, beat the egg and milk together.
5 Add the brown sugar, applesauce, and oil to the egg mixture. Mix well.
6 Combine the wet ingredients with the dry ingredients until just mixed.
7 Pour the batter into the prepared loaf pan.
8 Bake for 60 minutes.
9 Cool and serve.
